objects.name: Canvas Breach Disrupts Schools & Colleges Nationwide
objects.description: An ongoing data extortion attack targeting the widely-used education technology platform Canvas disrupted classes and coursework at school districts and universities across the United States today, after a cybercrime group defaced the service's login page with a ransom demand that threatened to leak data from 275 million students and faculty across nearly 9,000 educational institutions.

external_references.description: Canvas Breach Disrupts Schools & Colleges Nationwide
